name: Sunbelt Rentals Holdings, Inc.
business: Sunbelt Rentals rents construction, industrial, and general equipment like aerial work platforms, forklifts, and excavators, complemented by specialty lines including power and HVAC, scaffold services, film and TV equipment, and temporary structures. The company serves customers ranging from multinational businesses to local contractors and do-it-yourselfers, including construction, industrial, service, emergency response, event organizers, and government entities.
sellsTo: service, repair and facility management businesses

exposures.sentence: Mega projects (with a construction value over $400 million) made up an increasing part of recent years construction start values and project activity continues to be robust, particularly in the data center space, with the total pipeline of mega projects starts projected to grow from approximately $765 billion in 2023 through 2025 to more than $1.5 trillion in 2026 through 2028, based on projects currently in planning.

Construction projects are also becoming larger and longer, often completed over several years, with mega projects which can include, for example, data centers, electric vehicle factories, battery plants and semi-conductor factories becoming an increasingly important part of our project portfolio.

Construction projects are also becoming larger and longer, often completed over several years, with mega projects which can include, for example, data centers, electric vehicle factories, battery plants and semi-conductor factories becoming an increasingly important part of our project portfolio.

Construction projects are also becoming larger and longer, often completed over several years, with mega projects which can include, for example, data centers, electric vehicle factories, battery plants and semi-conductor factories becoming an increasingly important part of our project portfolio.
A large portion of our customer base comes from the commercial construction and industrial sectors.

catalysts.event: Addition of 300 to 400 greenfield locations in North America during Sunbelt 4.0, with 99 added as of April 30, 2026.
catalysts.sentence: We aim to add 300 to 400 greenfield locations in North America during Sunbelt 4.0, of which 99 had been added as of April 30, 2026.

catalysts.event: 50% reduction in Scope 1 and 2 greenhouse gas intensity by 2034 from a 2024 base year.
catalysts.sentence: We have targeted an ambitious 50% reduction in Scope 1 and 2 greenhouse gas intensity by 2034 (using 2024 as the base year) on our journey to become Net Zero by 2050.

catalysts.event: 1% of post-tax profit to community investment by 2028/29.
catalysts.sentence: 1% of post-tax profit going to community investment by 2028/29, and scaling strategic sustainability and community partnerships.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. rental industry revenue expected to grow 4% in 2026, 4% in 2027, and 4% in 2028.
tamClaims.sentence: According to a study by S&P Global Market Intelligence published in May 2026, rental industry revenue in the United States is expected to grow 4% in 2026, 4% in 2027 and 4% in 2028 (compared to 13% in 2023, 8% in 2024 and 4% in 2025).

tamClaims.claim: Canadian rental industry revenue expected to grow 5% in 2026, 6% in 2027, and 5% in 2028.
tamClaims.sentence: Rental industry revenue in Canada is expected to grow 5% in 2026, 6% in 2027 and 5% in 2028 (compared to 4% in 2023, 6% in 2024 and 4% in 2025).

tamClaims.claim: Total pipeline of mega project starts projected to grow from approximately $765 billion (2023-2025) to more than $1.5 trillion (2026-2028).
tamClaims.sentence: The total pipeline of mega projects starts projected to grow from approximately $765 billion in 2023 through 2025 to more than $1.5 trillion in 2026 through 2028, based on projects currently in planning.

tamClaims.claim: Rental penetration for equipment in North America could reach well over 60% in the medium to long term.
tamClaims.sentence: We see potential for market penetration for rental equipment to reach well over 60% in North America in the medium to long term.

tamClaims.claim: The three largest players in North America represent approximately 31% of the market; Sunbelt Rentals has an estimated 11% market share in North America and 10% in the UK.
tamClaims.sentence: The three largest players in the North American market represent approximately 31% of the market in aggregate.

tamClaims.claim: The Canadian rental market is estimated to be less than a tenth of the size of the U.S. market.
tamClaims.sentence: Canada also remains a growing market for us, with the overall rental market estimated to be less than a tenth of the size of the U.S. market.
